name: Metal Oil Rubbed Toilet Brush And Holder Set Bronze - Threshold™: Steel Construction, Reusable, 18.7" Height
description:
The Solid Toilet Brush Set from Threshold™ adds functional style to your bath space. Crafted from sturdy iron, this toilet bowl brush is made with flexible plastic bristles that help you clean hard-to-reach areas under your toilet seat and inside the toilet bowl for a thorough cleaning. The iron toilet brush comes with a narrow brush holder that easily fits in tight spaces in your bathroom, and the classic design provides a touch of timeless style you're sure to love adding to your existing decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
